Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Support the federation war effort by crafting weapons for our soldiers!

We need more recruit's staves!

Glad you've come. We have healers without focuses. Specifically, priests without staves.

Dirine in the focuscrafting area of the Creation Workshop knows how to make them. Start there and get materials at the workshop as you need them.

One must first understand before one can create.

Understanding is sometimes as easy as accepting.
